title: VS Orbit
body:
# VS Orbit
Astrophysics in Minecraft

## Current features:
1. The gravitational pull of the planet on the ship.
2. Real-time calculation of the movement of the planet.
3. Planet-ship collision (fixed, to be exact)
4. Jump Engine.

## Future Plans:
1. Entity free spins.

## Existing issues:
1. Gravitational error
2. Multi-fabric teleportation issues (may be fixed immediately)
